[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001 2
1 0010000 1
2 0101001 3
3 0100110 3
4 1001011 4
5 0111110 5
6 1111110 6
7 0011100 3

12 21 0100000 1
23 32 0000010 1

45 54 0111110 5 match 5
56 65 0011100 3 match 7
67 76 0000100 1
70 07 1000000 1
